description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical hat with a pronounced, wide brim that undulates slightly at the edges, giving it a textured, organic appearance. The surface is covered in a rough, almost rippled pattern, suggesting a material that is not perfectly smooth, possibly felt or a similar fabric. The crown is straight-sided and flat-topped, maintaining a consistent diameter from base to top. The brim flares outward and is irregular, with a wavy edge that adds visual interest and a sense of movement. The color is a uniform metallic gray, with subtle variations in shading due to the surface texture. There are no visible decorative elements, bands, or logos on the exterior.
description: A tall, flat-topped hat with a wide, wavy brim and a rough, metallic gray surface texture. The design is simple and unadorned, with no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, cylindrical crown and the wide, undulating brim with pronounced surface texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the consistent height of the crown and the irregular, rippled edge of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat-topped crown and the textured, outward-flaring brim with subtle shading.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the wavy brim and the rough, metallic surface of the hat.
